default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and CMS implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec's learn section (exec.com/learn) will host new SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [GrowthX to ramp up content production to 5-10 articles/week, aiming for 1200 annually](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Exec's Contentful CMS setup is robust, with custom AI-powered interactive elements](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [GrowthX to use Midjourney for article images initially; may refine approach later](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration and Production

  - [Sean reviewed initial article, found it impressively non-AI-like in tone](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [GrowthX uses GPT-4 for content generation, goes through multiple refinement stages](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Aiming to ramp up to 5-10 articles/week, with a long-term goal of 1200 articles annually](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to get Contentful CMS access; Sean shared training guide](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### Exec's CMS and Website Setup

  - [Exec uses Contentful CMS with custom React app for rendering](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Learn section (exec.com/learn) hosts content in series/categories](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Custom AI-powered interactive elements (e.g., resume builders, rephrasing tools)](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [New website design in progress with updated color palette](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)

### SEO and Technical Considerations

  - [Remove "explore page" links from articles (custom workshop pages)](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct technical SEO audit to identify potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Exec working on performance optimizations (Lighthouse scores)](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [H1 tags used only for article titles; H2 and below for content headers](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)

### Image Creation for Articles

  - [GrowthX to use Midjourney AI for initial image creation](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [May refine approach later if needed; Exec open to abstract/vector art style](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)

### CTA and Publishing Process

  - [Exec has a "sidebar CTA" feature configurable per article](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [No staging environment; changes publish directly to production](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=2366.0)
  - [Fast feedback loop for content adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sean to share Contentful CMS access and training guide with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin ramping up content production to 5-10 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore Midjourney for article image creation](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct technical SEO audit of Exec's setup](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Schedule Contentful CMS training session for GrowthX team if needed after reviewing guide](https://fathom.video/share/VR42mWxLUSTr_KNoLkfyY2zcVJyjrxzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

action_items.description: Loop in Enica for technical SEO audit of exec.com
Add "Learn" section to top navigation of exec.com
Share Contentful CMS training access via notion to team@growthx.com
Remove links to explore pages in drafted articles
